name: Christian Cali
title: Tradecraft & Client Engagements
paragraphs: Christian leads how Qntify scopes and runs investigations. He brings a career in government intelligence to the firm — translating the discipline of source handling, target development, and verification into work product that holds up in court and in front of investment committees.
He owns relationships with counsel, claims investors, and government counterparties, and personally directs every sensitive engagement.

name: Nelson D'Amour
title: Data Pipelines & Engineering
paragraphs: Nelson is the technologist behind Qntify's data infrastructure. He designs the ingestion, entity-resolution, and monitoring systems that let two people cover the breadth normally reserved for much larger firms — and treats every dataset as something that has to be reproducible, auditable, and defensible.
A scientist by training, he brings the rigor of experimental work to intelligence problems: hypothesis, instrumentation, measurement, falsification.
